title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now that's what I call first-rate skill! Nice job,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Look at the new recruits to my Halo Army!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm happy! Here, I'll grant you the right
to receive my compliments!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, let's make our triumphant return! Ohohoho!
